hooks.command: bash -c 'input=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$input" | jq -r ".file_path // empty" 2>/dev/null); if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE "(\.env(\..*)?$|package-lock\.json$|pnpm-lock\.yaml$|\.lock$)"; then echo "[BLOCKED] Sensitive file detected. Modifications to .env files and lock files should be done manually."; exit 2; fi'

FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_PARAMETERS" | jq -r '.file_path // empty' 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && [ -f "$FILE" ]; then REAL_FILE=$(realpath "$FILE" 2>/dev/null); REAL_DIR=$(realpath "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$REAL_FILE" ] && [ -n "$REAL_DIR" ] && printf '%s' "$REAL_FILE" | grep -q "^${REAL_DIR}/"; then cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && pnpm exec biome check --write "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; pnpm exec prettier --write "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; fi; fi; true

FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_PARAMETERS" | jq -r '.file_path // empty' 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && [ -f "$FILE" ] && echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx|js|md|mdx)$'; then REAL_FILE=$(realpath "$FILE" 2>/dev/null); REAL_DIR=$(realpath "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$REAL_FILE" ] && [ -n "$REAL_DIR" ] && printf '%s' "$REAL_FILE" | grep -q "^${REAL_DIR}/"; then cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && RESULT=$(pnpm exec cspell --no-progress "$FILE" 2>&1); if [ $? -ne 0 ]; then echo "[SPELLCHECK] Errors found in $FILE:"; echo "$RESULT"; echo "Fix typos in the source code, or add legitimate technical terms to cspell.json in the words array."; fi; fi; fi; true
